Package jline.lang

Class NetworkAttribute

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.lang.NetworkAttribute
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    public class NetworkAttribute
extends Object
implements Serializable
    Class for auxiliary information stored in Network objects
